key.name: widgets-config
key.summary: List of configurations for multiple image widgets (JSON array)
key.description:
A JSON string containing an array of objects. Each object represents a single desktop image widget and contains the following properties:
- id (string): Unique identifier for the widget. - widget-size (int): Size of the image widget in pixels. Controls the width and height of the desktop image widget. - widget-aspect-ratio (double): Aspect ratio of the image widget. Defines the aspect ratio (width to height) of the desktop image widget. - widget-position-x (int): X position of the image widget. Sets the horizontal position of the desktop image widget. - widget-position-y (int): Y position of the image widget. Sets the vertical position of the desktop image widget. - image-path (string): Path to the image file or folder. Specifies the file path of the image to be displayed on the desktop. - widget-timeout (int): Timeout for image updates. Defines the interval in seconds for updating the image displayed on the desktop. - widget-corner-radius (int): Corner radius of the image widget. Sets the corner radius for the desktop image widget, giving it rounded corners. - time-last-update (int): Time of last update of the image. - current-image-path (string): Path to the currently displayed image. Stores the path of the image currently being displayed on the desktop.
